mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSAGE(MS_NUM, MS_CONTENT, MS_SENDER_NUM, MS_RECEIVER_NUM, TET_NUM) VALUES(#{msNum}, #{msContent}, #{msSenderNum}, #{msReceiverNum}, #{tetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(ER.ER_PASS) FROM EXAM_RESULT ER JOIN TEST T ON ER.TET_NUM = T.TET_NUM WHERE T.CLA_NUM = #{claNum} AND ER.USER_NUM = #{userNum}
